# TikTok Split Testing

## URL

https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/split-testing?lang=en

## Core point

TikTok Split Testing splits audiences across two versions and can test variables such as targeting, placement, bidding/optimization, and creative.

## Use inside this pack

Use for fast creative and targeting isolation.

## Agent instruction

When this source applies, convert it into an executable campaign or measurement artifact. Do not merely cite it.

## Reliability note

Classify this source as official platform/regulator/academic depending on the source. Prefer direct platform documentation for platform behavior and academic/field-experiment sources for measurement discipline.
